entries.text: KS reports very restless night Feb 23-24 — woke multiple times, bad sleep quality. Oura confirms: 301 restless periods, 12min deep sleep, 79% efficiency, HRV 36. Possible factors: cumulative stress from Pixie emergency night before + Mounjaro week 1 adjustment.
KS wants daily AI + virtual production news briefing for X3D — to be added to morning routine
KS wants top 3 AI + virtual production news stories added to the 8:30am morning briefing for X3D — folded into existing Granola debrief, not a separate briefing

Janet keeps offering bot restarts that have already happened across sessions — root cause is lack of state awareness between sessions. Fix: always check bot PID start time and file modification dates before suggesting restarts.

Janet repeatedly offered bot restarts that had already been completed in earlier sessions. Root cause: not verifying system state (bot PID, file timestamps, code contents) before suggesting actions. Fix is behavioral — always check actual state before proposing changes.

KS has a pulled glute muscle (possibly from ~2 days ago), causing pain when lying down and moving around. Likely contributing to poor sleep quality alongside Mounjaro adjustment. Pixie has fully recovered from colitis.
Automated weekly updates with logging have been scheduled starting March 2, 2025
Ensure logging is enabled for all updates to track changes and roll back if needed
KS decided not to attend Film Mart (March 17-20), resolving the NVZ scheduling conflict
Exploring Obsidian + Claude Code integration — KS saw demo videos, considering adding Obsidian as a shared knowledge base that both KS and Janet can access
KS removed Antigravity Cockpit extension from Claude Code — usage monitoring unaffected, still runs via claude-monitor on Mac Mini

Built pre-recycle memory flush — Claude dumps un-persisted context as journal tags before the process recycles every 20 exchanges. Processes journal/deadline/idea tags but not reminders/calendar/email (those need KS intent).
Research Lumen AI as memory manager — used with OpenClaw, potentially applicable to Janet's Claude Code architecture for smarter memory retrieval and management

OpenClaw memory architecture research — plain markdown on disk (same as current approach) plus semantic vector search for retrieval. Mem0 and Supermemory plugins auto-capture facts per turn. Key gap in Janet: no semantic retrieval, only chronological. Worth exploring vector search over long-memory and journal entries.
Janet CLI sessions were using Claude Code built-in WebSearch tool instead of Brave API directly — fixed by calling Brave API via curl with existing API key from .env

memsearch (zilliztech/memsearch) — OpenClaw's memory system extracted as standalone library. Markdown-first, vector search via Milvus, Claude Code plugin available. Supports fully local setup with Ollama embeddings. Could replace Janet's linear 20-entry memory with semantic retrieval across all history.

Need to evaluate memsearch integration — Ollama for embeddings only (nomic-embed-text, 274MB), Milvus Lite for local vector DB, memsearch as the glue layer. Claude Code stays as the reasoning engine. KS confirmed interest in installing.

Thorough review of OpenClaw memory docs complete. Key features to replicate on top of memsearch: hybrid search (BM25 + vector), temporal decay (30-day half-life for daily notes, no decay for curated memory), MMR diversity re-ranking, two-layer memory (curated MEMORY.md + daily logs). Skip QMD backend and multi-agent scoping — not needed for Janet's architecture.

memsearch semantic memory system installed and wired into bot.js — Ollama nomic-embed-text for embeddings, Milvus Lite for vector DB, memsearch-bridge.js for search, auto-sync journal entries to markdown on every tag write

Completed memsearch memory system installation — Ollama nomic-embed-text for local embeddings, Milvus Lite vector DB, 22 chunks indexed across MEMORY.md and 4 daily logs. Wired into bot.js for semantic search on every message. Pending bot restart to go live.
Set up git repo for Janet's discord-bot codebase — private repo at keyboardcowgirl45/janet-discord-bot on GitHub, secrets excluded via .gitignore
KS wants Janet to proactively research OpenClaw and AI assistant improvements weekly, then propose relevant upgrades — not wait for KS to ask
Weekly Saturday research sweep — automated Brave Search for OpenClaw updates, Claude Code agent patterns, memory system innovations — compiled into actionable proposals for KS
Security audit revealed: no Discord user auth (anyone on shared server can interact), macOS firewall disabled, sensitive files world-readable, personal data committed to git
KS decided personal data in git repo is acceptable for now (private repo). File permissions fixed to 600 on .env, google-credentials.json, google-token.json, ~/.mcp.json
Nightly midnight git auto-commit and push added to bot.js scheduled tasks — backs up all daily changes to private GitHub repo automatically
